Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looking at the log there are distinct documents apps being worked on Quarterly Report docx appears at the start and end Document1 docx is worked on for a while Email Inbox is handled Report Draft pdf is reviewed Budget 2024 xlsx is updated Then Document1 docx is revisited saved and closed Then Quarterly Report docx is revisited edited saved and closed

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: A good way to define cases could be by the primary document or task being handled Lets define cases based on the main document file being worked on or perhaps group them by logical work sessions

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Given the switches it might be best to define cases by the specific document task Case 1 Working on Document1 docx initial draft Case 2 Handling Email about Annual Meeting Case 3 Reviewing Report Draft pdf Case 4 Updating Budget 2024 xlsx Case 5 Finalizing Document1 docx Case 6 Finalizing Quarterly Report docx

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: Alternatively all these could be part of one larger Report Preparation case but process mining usually benefits from distinct cases for each instance

Name: Validation - PE
Text: It makes sense to group all events related to Document1 docx into one case Similar worked on at start and end Group into one case This grouping makes sense Each case represents a distinct work item The events for each case will be extracted and ordered by timestamp

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets define Case IDs based on the document window title Case 001 Document1 docx Case 002 Email Annual Meeting Case 003 Report Draft pdf Case 004 Budget 2024 xlsx Case 005 Quarterly Report docx

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The log shows Quarterly Report docx at 08 59 50 and then again at 09 07 15 These are part of the same document workflow Document1 docx at 09 00 00 to 09 01 15 then again at 09 06 00 to 09 07 00

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Now Activity Naming Translate raw actions to higher level process steps

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Email Open Email Read Scroll Review Email Reply Type Draft Reply Send Send Reply For PDF Open Open Report Review Highlight Review Annotate For Excel Open Open Spreadsheet Update Figures Update Data Save Save Updates

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I will exclude the SWITCH lines from the event log as they represent navigation between cases rather than activities within the case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This is standard practice in process mining to avoid noise

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I will create a table with columns Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Application Window Document Raw Action optional but good for traceability

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Mapping 08 59 50 Case 005 Open Document Quarterly Report docx 09 00 00 Case 001 Open Document Document1 docx 09 00 30 Case 001 Edit Content Document1 docx 09 01 00 Case 001 Edit Content Document1 docx 09 01 15 Case 001 Save Document Document1 docx 09 02 00 Case 002 Open Email Email Inbox 09 02 30 Case 002 Read Email Email Inbox 09 02 45 Case 002 Compose Reply Email Inbox 09 03 00 Case 002 Compose Reply Email Inbox 09 03 20 Case 002 Send Email Email Inbox 09 04 30 Case 003 Review PDF Report Draft pdf 09 04 45 Case 003 Annotate PDF Report Draft pdf 09 05 00 Case 004 Open Spreadsheet Budget 2024 xlsx 09 05 15 Case 004 Update Data Budget 2024 xlsx 09 05 30 Case 004 Update Data Budget 2024 xlsx 09 05 45 Case 004 Save Spreadsheet Budget 2024 xlsx 09 06 15 Case 001 Edit Content Document1 docx 09 06 30 Case 001 Save Document Document1 docx 09 07 00 Case 001 Close Document Document1 docx 09 07 15 Case 005 Open Document Quarterly Report docx 09 07 45 Case 005 Edit Content Quarterly Report docx 09 08 00 Case 005 Save Document Quarterly Report docx 09 08 15 Case 005 Close Document Quarterly Report docx

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check consistency Case IDs are consistent Activity names are standardized Timestamps match original The log tells a coherent story of a reporting workflow with interleaved tasks
